_header.file_role: E1 anchor fleet AC baseline config (hand-written, wave 1 scaffold)

metadata.source_note: Qwen Qwen3-8B (base): 36 dense decoder layers, d_model 4096, GQA (32 Q heads / 8 KV heads, head_dim 128), SwiGLU FFN 12288, vocab 151936, RoPE theta 1000000 (rope_scaling null), RMSNorm eps 1e-6, untied embeddings (tie_word_embeddings false). Architecture facts: official HF config.json of Qwen/Qwen3-8B (hidden_size 4096, num_hidden_layers 36, num_attention_heads 32, num_key_value_heads 8, head_dim 128, intermediate_size 12288, vocab_size 151936, rope_theta 1000000, rms_norm_eps 1e-6, max_position_embeddings 40960, tie_word_embeddings false); layer/head counts cross-checked against the Qwen3 Technical Report (arXiv 2505.09388, Table 1: Qwen3-8B 36 layers, 32/8 heads, no tied embeddings, 128K context). original_max_position set to 32768 (Qwen3 native pretrain context; the 40960 HF value is the shipped max position). Unrepresented in schema 0.3: Qwen3 applies per-head QK RMSNorm (q_norm/k_norm) inside attention, adding 2*d_head*n_heads*n_layers ~= 9.4M params (~0.1%) not booked by AC's ledger; noted here, not modeled. params counts follow AC's parameter ledger (2*vocab*d embeddings + 2*d_model RMSNorm per layer); for dense models the ledger books active == total, matching configs/mistral_7b.json conventions.
